commands.summary: All 713 collected Vitest assertions passed, but the full command retained known baseline collection failures: 3 e2e Playwright specs missing @playwright/test and 2 Odysseus TAP .mjs files with no Vitest suite. Treated as baseline environment/config debt, not a changed-file regression.
Focused regression tests passed: 2 files, 12 tests.
Repo-wide lint still has pre-existing baseline debt: 217 errors and 102 warnings across unrelated files.

Focused changed-file lint passed with 0 errors and 1 known no-shadow warning in src/screens/skills/skills-screen.tsx. Mechanical import-order/sort-import issues introduced by the candidate were fixed.
Production client and SSR build passed.

baseline_failures: pnpm test collects e2e/*.spec.ts without @playwright/test installed.
pnpm test collects services/odysseus/tests/streaming/*.test.mjs TAP files as Vitest suites.
pnpm lint has repo-wide strict-type/import baseline errors unrelated to this cycle.
